arts.sum: Manchester United’s upcoming summer transfer window could be crucial one that could shape the club’s immediate future under Ruben Amorim. It has been reported that the club will being undergoing massive 10-man exodus with some big players on the chopping block including Marcus Rashford, Jadon Sancho, Antony, and Casemiro.
